name: Bremerton National
stampLocation: Inside Avian Flight Center (FBO) during normal business hours – OR – Inside Pilot's Lounge (adjacent to self-serve fuel pumps) 24/7 access. NOTE: there will be extensive airport construction from April 25 through August 31. Additional info at: https://www.portofbremerton.org/airport-construction

name: Bowerman Field
stampLocation: Fuel shack between 100LL and Jet A fuel islands.

name: Westport
stampLocation: Southeast side of ramp west of windsock

name: Sanderson Field
stampLocation: Stamp located in west end of Hangar 87 (a 16-plane T-hangar) along taxiway A1. Use ASOS frequency to enter pilot lounge. Lounge has good signage marking location and there is free WIFI (Code is on wall inside) restroom tables chairs couches small fridge coffee bottled water mints & aviation books.

name: Olympia
stampLocation: WSDOT Aviation Ramp. Northwest side of the field. North of Tower. In Orange and white kiosk. Stamp Available 24/7 for those flying in and Tuesdays & Wednesdays from 0800L to 1700L access via WSDOT Aviation office for those driving in. Additional stamps located at Safety in Motion and Glacier FBO's check with FBO's for hours and availability

name: Tacoma Narrows

name: Ranger Creek

name: Swanson Field
stampLocation: mailbox is in the information booth at the drive-in entrance to the airport on the NW corner. There is a flagpole near the booth. Gravel service road around RWY 16/34 is not available for aircraft operations. PLEASE READ CHART SUPPLEMENT FOR DETAILS.

name: Shady Acres
stampLocation: Driving or biking? Please avoid the private property. Where to park? Across from 208th St. 1. Walk down edge of grass airstrip that is on east side of asphalt runway. Stay on edge as planes land on grass airstrip. It is on same side as Shady Acres sign. 2. Walk to right of sign. 3. Mowed area next to the driveway is the parking area. Mailbox is on East side of field by single standing fir tree mid field.

name: Copalis
stampLocation: Lat/Long is estimated and should not be used for pre-flight planning or navigational purposes. There is no stamp on site due to ongoing theft. Participants should take a photo of themselves at the airport for validation. When validating your passport at Auburn airport participants will have an opportunity to receive a Copalis stamp at that time.

address: 498 Duck Lake Dr NE Ocean Shores WA 98569
stampLocation: Pilot's Lounge south of parking. Key is in bathroom.
